settings.title: Settings
settings.quickHint: Adjust a few settings without leaving the game.
settings.quickUnavailable: No quick settings available for this mode yet.

game.pinkNoiseInfo: A background tone accompanies each stimulus. You can customize or disable it in the audio settings.

soroban.instrBeadDesc: Each rod represents a digit. The top bead (heaven) is worth 5. The bottom beads (earth) are worth 1 each. Move beads toward the center bar to activate them.
soroban.instrExampleDesc: 7 = heaven bead down (5) + 2 earth beads up (2). Tap or drag beads to move them.
soroban.instrGoalDesc: A number will appear. Set the beads to represent it, then tap Submit. Be accurate and fast!
soroban.settingsRodsHint: Set via N-Level in game settings
soroban.settingsTrialsHint: Set via Trials in game settings

guide.swipeNormal: Swipe from the last position (N-0) to the position from {{n}} steps ago (N-{{n}}). Double-tap if same position.
guide.swipeSequential: Swipe step by step from N-0 to N-{{n}}, passing through each intermediate position. Double-tap if same position.
guide.swipeDynamic: Swipe following the displayed rule. Double-tap if same position.
guide.warmup: Memorize the positions — no response required.
guide.writeDraw: Draw the letter heard {{n}} steps ago • Tap to validate
guide.writeDrawColor: Draw the letter heard {{n}} steps ago • Select its color • Tap to validate
guide.writeType: Type the letter heard {{n}} steps ago • Enter to validate
guide.writeTypeColor: Type the letter heard {{n}} steps ago • Select its color • Enter to validate
